name: /analyze coverage caveat enumerates which languages have full versus partial rule coverage
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{}\n' > repo/package.json && printf 'package main\n' > repo/main.go && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/analyze.sh" --root repo --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'first_class=javascript,typescript,python' out.txt && grep -q 'partial=go' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
